prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约17454→18209→18714→20940，连续4年后移，累计后移约3486名；2025年基准位次约20940名，近3年每年后移幅度约500–2200名，后移趋势 明显；本省计划2022年2人、2023年5人、2024年4人、2025年5人；2026年计划5人，与2025年持平，无扩招缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流 建设高校；软科主榜约第195名，近年排名稳定在中后段；近年声誉平稳，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第30位（较热），短视频平台曝光度较高，反映报考 关注度有所上升；未见历史投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力处于培育阶段，对报考的额外吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 西藏大学位于拉萨市，距天津较远，跨省就读的地域偏好较低，但211层次对部分考生仍有吸引力；该校 在天津招生计划仅5人，规模极小，位次易受少数考生报考决策波动影响；该校在津招生专业涉及计算机类（高热推荐）、汉语言文学（推荐）、法学（分化观望）、生物科学（明显劝退）等；本省2026年考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增 加约14%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年本省考生大幅增加（+14%）而招生计划持平、抖 音热度上升带来的关注度提升，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，最低位次在2025年20940名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约21140名，区间20640–21640名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（纳金校区）
- 税收学（罗布林卡财经校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 汉语言文学（师范类）（河坝林校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学（河坝林校区）
- 生物科学（师范类）（纳金校区）
- 城乡规划（纳金校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间20640–21640名内，建议以二档汉语言文学（师范类）为主攻方向，一档计算机科学与技术、税收学作为冲刺，三档法学、城乡规划作为稳妥选择，生物科学因就 业前景不佳建议谨慎填报。位次明显优于区间下限（<20640名）可重点冲刺一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings approximately 17454→18209→18714→20940, shifting backward for 4 consecutive years, cumulative shift of about 3486 places; 2025 baseline ranking approximately 20940, annual shift of about 500–2200 places in recent 3 years, clear backward trend; local plan: 2 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, 5 in 2025; 2026 plan 5, same as 2025, no expansion to ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 195th, stable in mid-to-lower range in recent years; reputation stable, no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 30th (relatively hot), high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting increased application attention; no historical admission cutoff gaps; no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, overall discipline strength in cultivation stage, limited additional appeal for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tibet University located in Lhasa, far from Tianjin, low regional preference for cross-province study, but 211 level still attractive to some candidates; enrollment plan in Tianjin only 5, very small scale, rankings easily affected by decisions of a few candidates; majors in Tianjin include Computer Science (highly recommended), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Biological Science (clearly discouraged); local candidate total in 2026 approximately 82000, increase of about 14% from 2025's 71938, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, significant increase in local candidates in 2026 (+14%) with stable enrollment plan, and increased attention from rising Douyin popularity, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with minimum ranking continuing to shift backward from 2025's 20940; predicted minimum ranking approximately 21140, range 20640–21640.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Najin Campus)
- Taxation (Luobulinka Finance and Economics Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) (Heba Lin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law (Heba Lin Campus)
- Biological Science (Teacher Training) (Najin Campus)
- Urban and Rural Planning (Najin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range 20640–21640, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology and Taxation as reach options, and Tier 3 Law and Urban and Rural Planning as safe choices; Biological Science due to poor employment prospects is advised to be filled cautiously. Rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<20640) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
